calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2005 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-11-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-11-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Sep-13-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as a reassignment from the Master Calendar for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
Luis Duvernay, Esq. for Plaintiff: Gwendolyn Cunningham, also present.
Mike Smith, Esq. for Defendants: Kate Hanlin and Richard Hanlin, not present.
Parties settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Defendant shall make to Plaintiff a payment of $4,587.00 within 20 days, in exchange for a Dismissal with prejudice. Total Medical Expenses of $685.50 is included in the payment.
Parties agreed to terms in open court, matter is deemed settled by the Court and placed on the CRC-225 calendar of Sept. 13, 2005 at 10 a.m. in Dept. 212 for DISMISSAL.
